transcript: [accented] No, I... No, I... I want a new record.
[accented] Uhhh... the Eel Bowel? Is that... how you say?
You've called here about sixty-five times.
[accented] Eh... An eel bowel is important to my family.
Yeah, well, it's important to my family too, but we can't get it anymore, so...
Yes, she said she has it in the bag. $49.98.
[accented] Which one... Which release do you carry, of, uh, Eel Bowel?
I'm not really sure, I think we just have the one. "Eel Bowel's Greatest Hits".
Here's a D.U. Records compilation called Longmont Potion Castle II.
